popularStory.headline: Cockayne Families
popularStory.description:
Is there another Old Derbshire family with such memorabilia for the historian, with so many vicissitudes and so many dramatic episodes, as the Cokaynes? 

Derbyshire provides much of the finest scener …

zh.Youlgreave, Derbyshire, England: 英國英格蘭德比夏爾尤爾格亞福
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Cokayne於1441年出生在英國德比夏爾阿希布恩時，他的父親Sir John V, Cokayne Esquire31歲，母親Agnes Vernon14歲。他於1475年與Agnes Barlow在英國德比夏爾巴洛結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1488年在英國英格蘭德比夏爾尤爾格亞福享年47歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭德比夏爾尤爾格亞福。

zh-hans.Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England: 英国德比夏爾阿希布恩 希丘特
zh-hans.Youlgreave, Derbyshire, England: 英国英格兰德比夏爾尤爾格亞福
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Cokayne于1441年出生在英国德比夏爾阿希布恩时，他的父亲Sir John V, Cokayne Esquire31岁，母亲Agnes Vernon14岁。他于1475年与Agnes Barlow在英国德比夏爾巴洛结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1488年在英国英格兰德比夏爾尤爾格亞福享年47岁，埋葬在英国英格兰德比夏爾尤爾格亞福。

nameMeanings.name: Cokayne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Cockayne
meanings: English (Midlands and Yorkshire): nickname for a dreamer, from Middle English cokayne ‘cloud-cuckooland’, the name of an imaginary paradise (Old French (pays de) cocaigne, from Middle Low German kōkenje, a diminutive of kōke ‘cake’, since in this land the houses were thought to be made of cake). It may also be a variant of Cocking or from the unflattering Middle English nickname cokin (Old French coquin) ‘disreputable person’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Cokayne was born in 1441, in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England, his father, Sir John V, Cokayne Esquire, was 31 and his mother, Agnes Vernon, was 14. He married Agnes Barlow in 1475, in Barlow, Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1488, in Youlgreave, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 47, and was buried in Youlgreave, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Cokayne est né en 1441, à Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John V, Cokayne Esquire, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Agnes Vernon, avait 14 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Barlow en 1475, à Barlow, Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1488, à Youlgreave, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Youlgreave, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Cokayne 1441 in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John V, Cokayne Esquire 31 und seine Mutter Agnes Vernon 14. Er hat 1475 in Barlow, Derbyshire, England Agnes Barlow geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1488 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Youlgreave, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Youlgreave, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Cokayne è nato il nel 1441 nel Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John V, Cokayne Esquire, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Vernon, aveva 14 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Barlow nel 1475, nel Barlow, Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1488, nel Youlgreave, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Youlgreave, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Cokayneが1441年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアアシュボウルンで生まれた時，父Sir John V, Cokayne Esquireは31歳，母Agnes Vernonは14歳であった。1475年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアバーロウでAgnes Barlowと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1488年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアイオウルグレエイブで47歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアイオウルグレエイブにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Cokayne(이)가 1441년 영국 더비실르 애쉬보우른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John V, Cokayne Esquire(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Vernon(은)는 14세였다. 그는 1475년 영국 더비실르 발로에서 Agnes Barlow(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1488년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 요우그리브에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 요우그리브에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Cokayne nasceu em 1441, em Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John V, Cokayne Esquire, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Vernon, tinha 14 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Barlow em 1475, em Barlow, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1488, em Youlgreave, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Youlgreave, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Cokayne родился в 1441 г. в местности ашбурн, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John V, Cokayne Esquire было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes Vernon, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Barlow в 1475 г. в местности барлоу, дирбишир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1488 г. в местности еулгрив, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности еулгрив, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Cokayne nació en 1441, en Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John V, Cokayne Esquire, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Agnes Vernon, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Agnes Barlow en 1475, en Barlow, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1488, en Youlgreave, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Youlgreave, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
